name: Bean and Cashew Nut Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the drained beans with the celery and sweet pepper.
2. Roast the cashew nuts in a dry frying pan until browned. Place on paper towels to cool.
3. When cooled, add the cashew nuts, green onions, and tomato sauce mixture (prepared below) to the bowl with the beans and stir well.
4. To prepare the tomato sauce mixture, combine garlic, salt, pepper, cumin, vinegar, and olive oil in a small bowl. Mix well.
5. Pour the tomato sauce mixture over the beans and mix thoroughly.
6. Allow the salad to stand for about an hour before serving.
